name: Pas-de-Calais (France)
description: A blue field strewn with yellow fleurs-de-lis, surmounted by a red label of three pendants each charged with yellow castles; the whole within a yellow border set with red roundels.
history: This is the historic coat of arms of the County of Artois, France ancien differenced by a label of Castile.

features.role: red label of three points bearing castles
